title: Trump Won’t Call Tariffs a Mistake, But Most of Us Have Real Regrets
description: Former Sony head Michael Lynton and investor Josh Steiner explain what they learned from their very public mistakes.
content: Former Sony head Michael Lynton and investor Josh Steiner explain what they learned from their very public mistakes.
